description: Perform a graph inference task in the 'demodb' travel agency database to identify potential travel companions. Seed the scenario with two 5-star reviews for 'Hotel Artemide' on '2023-12-25': one by 'john.smith@example.com' ('Great Xmas!') and one by 'maria.garcia@example.com' ('Lovely holiday!'). Create a 'PotentialCompanion' edge class and populate it by linking all pairs of users who reviewed the same hotel on the same date.
